name: sap-bapi-guard
description: Verify SAP BAPIs and block unverified ABAP BAPI calls before commit.

interface.shortDescription: Verify SAP BAPIs before ABAP generation.
interface.longDescription: SAP BAPI Guard helps Codex verify live SAP BAPI and function module signatures through ADT before generating or reviewing ABAP, and includes a Git pre-commit safety hook for unverified BAPI calls.
defaultPrompt: Use $sap-bapi-verifier to verify this BAPI before writing ABAP.
Scan this ABAP repository for unverified BAPI calls.
Install the SAP BAPI Guard pre-commit hook in this repo.
